title: CooperCompanies to Present at KeyBanc Life Sciences & MedTech Investor Forum
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Feb. 28, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (NYSE: COO), will participate in KeyBanc's Life Sciences & MedTech Investor Forum on Tuesday, March 21, 2022. Brian Andrews, Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer & Treasurer, will represent the Company in a virtual session scheduled to begin at 1:30 PM ET.

title: Here's Why You Should Add Cooper Companies (COO) Stock Now
text: Cooper Companies (COO) continues to benefit from strength in its business segments. Its acquisitions are likely to boost the top line further.

title: CooperCompanies to Present at Oppenheimer's 33rd Annual Healthcare Conference
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Feb. 15, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (NYSE: COO), will participate in Oppenheimer's 33rd Annual Healthcare Conference on Tuesday, March 14, 2022. Brian Andrews, Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer & Treasurer, will represent the Company in a virtual session scheduled to begin at 2:40 PM ET.

title: CooperCompanies Announces Release Date for First Quarter 2023
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Feb. 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (NYSE: COO) today announced it will report first quarter 2023 financial results on Thursday, March 2, 2023, at 4:15 PM ET. Following the release, the Company will host a conference call at 5:00 PM ET to discuss the results and current corporate developments. The dial-in number for the call is 800-715-9871 and the conference ID is 1757767. A simultaneous audio webcast can be accessed on CooperCompanies' investor relations website at http://investor.coopercos.com and a replay will be available shortly after the call on the same website.
